allow: Bash(wsl -e bash -c "export THEOS=~/theos && cd ~/ss_ios && make clean && make package 2>&1")
Bash(wsl -e bash -c "cd ~/ss_ios && ar x lib/libwolfssl.a src_bio.o 2>&1 && file src_bio.o && rm -f src_bio.o")
Bash(wsl -e bash -c "ls ~/wolfssl* 2>/dev/null; ls ~/ss_ios/wolfssl* 2>/dev/null; find ~ -maxdepth 3 -name ''wolfssl-*'' -type d 2>/dev/null; dpkg -l | grep wolfssl 2>/dev/null")
Bash(wsl -e bash -c "which xcrun clang arm-apple-darwin11-clang 2>/dev/null; ls ~/theos/toolchain/linux/iphone/bin/ 2>/dev/null | head -20")

Bash(wsl -e bash -c "cd ~ && ls wolfssl-* 2>/dev/null || \(wget -q https://github.com/wolfSSL/wolfssl/archive/refs/tags/v5.7.6-stable.tar.gz -O wolfssl.tar.gz && tar xzf wolfssl.tar.gz && ls wolfssl-*\)")
Bash(wsl -e bash -c "ls ~/wolfssl-5.7.6-stable/ >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo ''found'' || echo ''not found''; ls ~/wolfssl-*/configure 2>/dev/null || echo ''no configure''")
Bash(wsl -e bash -c "cd ~/wolfssl-5.7.6-stable && ls autogen.sh configure.ac Makefile.am")
Bash(wsl -e bash -c "cd ~/wolfssl-5.7.6-stable && which autoconf automake libtool 2>/dev/null && echo ''autotools found'' || echo ''autotools missing''")
Bash(wsl -e bash -c "sudo apt-get install -y autoconf automake libtool 2>&1 | tail -5")
Bash(wsl -e bash -c "which autoconf automake libtool 2>/dev/null && echo ''ready''")
Bash(wsl -e bash -c "sudo apt-get install -y autoconf automake libtool 2>&1 | tail -3")
Bash(wsl -e bash -c "export THEOS=~/theos && cd ~/ss_ios && make clean && make package 2>&1 | tail -30")
Bash(wsl -e bash -c 'export THEOS=~/theos && cd ~/ss_ios && make clean && make package 2>&1 | grep ""referenced from\\|_wc_\\|_sp_\\|_mem\\|_str"" | head -20')
Bash(wsl -e bash -c 'export THEOS=~/theos && cd ~/ss_ios && make clean && make package 2>&1 | tail -15')
